name: Temu platform qualification pack
change_note: Migrated from script PLATFORM_HINTS into a composable platform pack.
checklist_hints: Check supplier/manufacturer qualification, product test reports, labeling, and logistics readiness.

requirements.requirement: Verify current Temu supplier, manufacturer, service capability, and product onboarding requirements for the applicable seller route.
evidence_expected: official Temu policy or onboarding source
requirements.decision_effect: Unsupported supplier qualification blocks approval until clarified.
requirements.notes: Seed platform requirement; validate against official Temu materials available to the reviewer.

requirements.requirement: Check product reports, labels, model/SKU, factory, and logistics documents against Temu and destination-market requirements.
requirements.decision_effect: SKU/model or scope mismatch requires more information and can block approval.
requirements.notes: High priority for electronics, batteries, toys, and regulated products.

sources.title: Temu Seller Center
sources.confirms: Temu provides an official seller center for merchant onboarding and seller operations.

sources.title: Temu: Terms of Use
sources.confirms: Temu terms require users and sellers to comply with applicable laws and platform rules.

sources.title: Temu: U.S. Terms of Use
sources.confirms: Temu U.S. terms describe legal and platform obligations for use of the U.S. service.

sources.title: Temu: Product Safety Recalls
sources.confirms: Temu maintains an official product safety recalls page, supporting product safety review and post-market monitoring.

gaps: Seed pack: verify current official Temu policy pages per case before final decisions.
